---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or enhancement for the Dronzer Platform
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

**Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**
A clear and concise description of what the problem is.
*Example: "I'm frustrated that I can't configure per-model timeout values without a code change..."*

**Describe the solution you'd like**
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen. Include:
- What the user experience should look like (Dashboard UI? API endpoint? CLI command?)
- What the expected behavior is

**Which area of Dronzer does this affect?**

- [ ] Gateway / Routing Engine
- [ ] Provider Integration (new or existing provider)
- [ ] Admin Dashboard (UI/UX)
- [ ] API Key Management
- [ ] Plugin System
- [ ] Observability / Metrics
- [ ] Deployment / Infrastructure
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other

**Describe alternatives you've considered**
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered.

**Additional context**
Add any other context, mockups, or references to similar features in other projects.
